package rulecoverage

func PositiveRepositoryAcceptsGinContext() string {
    ruleID := "repository_accepts_gin_context"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Repositories that accept `*gin.Context` rather than `context.Context`."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
